message:
fix: add loading states and keyboard navigation for a11y/UX (#5492)

- GPUReservationsTab: disable Create button when delete confirm or
  reservation form is active (consistent with edit/delete buttons)
- CreateDashboardModal test: add test verifying button disabled/loading
  state during async creation
- ThemeSection: add Escape key to close theme dropdown, add ARIA
  attributes (role, aria-expanded, aria-selected, aria-haspopup)
- PredictionSettingsSection: add role="switch" and aria-checked to
  toggle buttons for proper semantic accessibility

Closes #5489
Closes #5490

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
